PCNDto.DescriptionOfChange: Existing cover replacement with NO LOGO version to improve our supply chain and better meet customer demands.

Littelfuse would like to notify you that we have qualified alternative Epoxy Molding Compound (EMC) material for various IXYS Brand Thyristor & Diode Discrete Packages to serve the Business Continuity Plan (BCP).
Based on Supplier communication, This PCN is invalid and the PCN to consider is the one sent on March 13.
Littelfuse would like to notify you that we qualified alternate assembly location fo IXYS Power Thyristor & Diode TO-220AB_AC package products with BCP consideration
We are excited to announce that Littelfuse, Inc. acquired C&K on July 19, 2022.
Notification of Marking/Label Change with SAP Go-alive for Power Discrete Products

Alert - We want to share with you a brief update on the Littelfuse power semiconductor manufacturing site in Lampertheim, Germany. The site recently experienced an electrical fire that occurred at the power distribution panel on the subfloor of the fab.
Littelfuse would like to notify you that we plan to qualify alternate assembly location for IXYS Power Thyristor & Diode Discrete products with BCP (Business Continuous Plan) consideration.
Alternate Assembly Location for IXYS Power Thyristor & Diode Discrete Product Family

With the integration of IXYS Semiconductor and Integrated Circuits Division (ICD) products into Littelfuse, we are moving packaging labels to Littelfuse standard label formats. Implementation of this change will begin the week of February 22, 2021. You can expect to receive products with both Littelfuse and IXYS branding during the implementation phase.
Archive - North American customers only:Assembled Device Marking Format Changes and Outer Box/Bag Label Format Changes
Assembled Device Marking Format Changes and Outer Box/Bag Label Format Changes

CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Littelfuse, Inc. (NASDAQ:LFUS) today announced the completion of its acquisition of IXYS Corporation (NASDAQ:IXYS). IXYS is a global pioneer in the power semiconductor market with a focus on medium- to highvoltage power semiconductors across the industrial, communications, consumer and medical device markets
As we continue to integrate the Hamlin Sensors business into Littelfuse Inc., we would like to notify you of an update on printing logo on the reed switches boxes come from our Philippines plant

An approved assembly subcontractor for IXYS Corporation will change the method they use to mark molded plastic packages; Laser marking will replace ink marking. The change to laser marking will be phased in throughout 2015 on a lot by lot basis.
